name: Taurus (DvN OC, Former Boss)
description:
Sparta's predecessor, at least for the AU I've set up. The second Specialist of the Dominion of Pinzhao's military unit Stronghold 5-5 and defector of Nusia.

He's a little rough, but not impossible to get along with.

This is a character I've thought of plenty of times, and I'm glad to finally get him out here. If he were ever ingame, he would be a Wave 3 boss with only Sparta's line attack.

Now updated to include my other Stronghold 5-5 characters.

Takes place in an alternate universe, before the events of HELLMET and DVN. oh yeah hes also in his 40s lma
creator: Retroware
